snippet.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai - Trailer | Varun | Mrunal | Pooja | David | In Cinemas 5th June 2026
snippet.description:
Get ready for fun, romance & full entertainment! ūüé¨‚ú®
Presenting the Trailer of Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai starring Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur & Pooja Hegde, directed by David Dhawan.
A perfect mix of comedy, love, confusion & family drama awaits you on the big screen! ‚Ě§ÔłŹūüĒ•

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let‚Äôs Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer

Song Credits : 
Track Name: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai 
Music Recreated by: Javed - Mohsin 
Additional Lyrics by: Mohsin Shaikh
Singers: Shankar Mahadevan & Hema Sardesai
Rap By Ranj & Earl Edgar
Original Music Composer: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics by: Sameer Anjaan

Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ ŗ§óŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ§≤ŗ•á ŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ§öŗ§įŗ•Ä ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ‚Ě§ÔłŹ
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, ‚ÄúGajale Sunchari.‚ÄĚ

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.

Saans Na Leti Raat

Ishq Karein Mere Honthon Se                      
Bas Ik Teri Baat 

Teri Doori Na Sahoon 
Door Khud Se Rahoon                                       
Tere Pahlu Mein Hi Reh Jaoon 
Tu Hi Samjhlein Jo Main Chahoon

ŗįłŗįāŗįóŗĪÄŗį§ ŗį≤ŗĪáŗį¨ŗĪĀŗį≤ŗĪć: ŗįúŗįāŗįóŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪÄ ŗįģŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįúŗįŅŗįēŗĪć (ŗįüŗĪąŗįģŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįģŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįúŗįŅŗįēŗĪć ŗįĶŗįĺŗįįŗįŅ ŗįĶŗįŅŗį≠ŗįĺŗįóŗįā)
ŗįéŗįóŗĪćŗįúŗįŅŗįēŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįüŗįŅŗįĶŗĪć ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗĪäŗį°ŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįłŗįįŗĪć: ŗįÖŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗĪáŗį§ŗĪć ŗįįŗįĺŗįĶŗĪĀ
ŗįłŗĪÜŗįēŗįāŗį°ŗĪć ŗįĮŗĪāŗį®ŗįŅŗįüŗĪć ŗį°ŗĪąŗįįŗĪÜŗįēŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪć: ŗįÖŗį¶ŗĪćŗį®ŗįĺŗį®ŗĪć ŗįé. ŗį∑ŗĪáŗįēŗĪć
ŗįÖŗįłŗĪčŗįłŗįŅŗįĮŗĪáŗįüŗĪć ŗį°ŗĪąŗįįŗĪÜŗįēŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪć: ŗį∂ŗĪĀŗįēŗĪćŗį§ŗįŅ ŗį∂ŗįįŗĪćŗįģ
ŗįģŗĪäŗį¶ŗįüŗįŅ ŗįłŗįĻŗįĺŗįĮ ŗį¶ŗįįŗĪćŗį∂ŗįēŗĪĀŗį°ŗĪĀ: ŗįÖŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗĪáŗį§ŗĪć ŗįįŗįĺŗįĶŗĪĀ

ŗįłŗĪćŗįēŗĪćŗįįŗįŅŗį™ŗĪćŗįüŗĪć & ŗįēŗįāŗįüŗįŅŗį®ŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįüŗĪÄ ŗįłŗĪāŗį™ŗįįŗĪć‚ÄĆŗįĶŗĪąŗįúŗįįŗĪć & ŗį°ŗĪąŗįįŗĪÜŗįēŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįÖŗįłŗįŅŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪÜŗįāŗįüŗĪć: ŗį¶ŗĪÄŗį∑ŗįĺ ŗį°ŗįĺŗį®ŗĪąŗįüŗĪć
ŗįēŗįĺŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįģŗĪć ŗį°ŗįŅŗįúŗĪąŗį®ŗįįŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪĀ: ŗįēŗĪĀŗį®ŗįĺŗį≤ŗĪć ŗįįŗįĺŗįĶŗį≤ŗĪć, ŗįÖŗį®ŗĪćŗį®ŗįĺ ŗįłŗįŅŗįāŗįóŗĪć, ŗį®ŗįģŗįŅŗį§ŗįĺ ŗįÖŗį≤ŗĪÜŗįóŗĪćŗįúŗįĺŗįāŗį°ŗįįŗĪć, ŗįÖŗįģŗĪÄ ŗį™ŗįüŗĪáŗį≤ŗĪć, ŗįłŗĪĀŗį®ŗįĺŗįēŗĪćŗį∑ŗįŅ ŗįįŗįĺŗį•ŗĪčŗį°ŗĪć, ŗį∑ŗįēŗįŅŗį≤ŗĪć ŗį∂ŗĪÜŗįüŗĪćŗįüŗįŅ, ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗįĺŗįāŗįē ŗįģŗĪĀŗįāŗį¶ŗįĺŗį°, ŗį∑ŗįĺŗįĻŗį¶ŗįĺŗį¨ŗĪć ŗįģŗįĺŗį≤ŗįŅŗįēŗĪć & ŗį§ŗĪÉŗį™ŗĪćŗį§ŗįŅ ŗį°ŗĪčŗįĮŗįŅŗįęŗĪčŗį°ŗĪć 
ŗįēŗĪäŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗĪčŗįóŗĪćŗįįŗįĺŗįęŗįįŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį≤ŗĪĀ: ŗįÜŗį¶ŗįŅŗį≤ŗĪć ŗį∑ŗĪáŗįēŗĪć, ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗįŅŗį®ŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįóŗĪĀŗį™ŗĪćŗį§ŗįĺ, ŗįįŗįĺŗįĻŗĪĀŗį≤ŗĪć ŗį∂ŗĪÜŗįüŗĪćŗįüŗįŅ
ŗįĮŗįĺŗįēŗĪćŗį∑ŗį®ŗĪć ŗį°ŗĪąŗįįŗĪÜŗįēŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪć: ŗįÖŗį¨ŗĪćŗį¨ŗįĺŗįłŗĪć ŗįÖŗį≤ŗĪÄ ŗįģŗĪäŗįėŗį≤ŗĪć
ŗį®ŗĪáŗį™ŗį•ŗĪćŗįĮ ŗįłŗįāŗįóŗĪÄŗį§ŗįā: ŗįĻŗį®ŗĪÄŗįęŗĪć ŗį∑ŗĪáŗįēŗĪć
ŗįüŗĪÄŗįúŗįįŗĪć ŗįłŗįāŗįóŗĪÄŗį§ŗįā: ŗįĻŗį®ŗĪÄŗįęŗĪć ŗį∑ŗĪáŗįēŗĪć
ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗĪäŗį°ŗįēŗĪćŗį∑ŗį®ŗĪć ŗį°ŗįŅŗįúŗĪąŗį®ŗįįŗĪć: ŗį∂ŗĪąŗį≤ŗĪáŗį∑ŗĪć ŗįģŗįĻŗįĺŗį¶ŗįŅŗįēŗĪć
ŗįÜŗįįŗĪćŗįüŗĪć ŗį°ŗĪąŗįįŗĪÜŗįēŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪć: ŗį¨ŗį¨ŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪā ŗįłŗįŅŗįāŗįóŗĪć (ŗįÖŗįįŗįĶŗįŅŗįāŗį¶ŗĪć)
ŗįįŗĪÜŗįāŗį°ŗįĶ DOP: ŗį∑ŗįĺŗįĻŗįŅŗį¶ŗĪć ŗį≤ŗįĺŗį≤ŗĪć
ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗĪäŗį°ŗįēŗĪćŗį∑ŗį®ŗĪć ŗįéŗįóŗĪćŗįúŗįŅŗįēŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįüŗįŅŗįĶŗĪćŗįłŗĪć: ŗįēŗĪĆŗįłŗįįŗĪć ŗįÖŗįĻŗĪćŗįģŗį¶ŗĪć, ŗį∑ŗįāŗį∑ŗĪáŗįįŗĪć ŗįÖŗį≤ŗĪÄ, ŗįÖŗįłŗĪćŗį≤ŗįĺŗįā ŗįłŗįĮŗĪćŗįĮŗį¶ŗĪć, ŗįÖŗįāŗįúŗį≤ŗįŅ ŗįĶŗįįŗĪćŗįģ, ŗį≤ŗĪĀŗį¨ŗĪąŗį®ŗįĺ ŗįģŗįįŗĪćŗįöŗįāŗįüŗĪć, ŗį¶ŗįŅŗį≤ŗĪÄŗį™ŗĪć ŗįöŗįĶŗįĺŗį®ŗĪć, ŗįĶŗįŅŗį®ŗĪčŗį¶ŗĪć ŗįįŗįĺŗįúŗį™ŗĪćŗįēŗįįŗĪć, ŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗįŅŗį§ŗįĺ ŗįúŗįēŗĪčŗį°ŗįŅŗįĮŗįĺ
CFO: ŗį∂ŗĪćŗįįŗĪÄŗį®ŗįŅŗįĶŗįĺŗįłŗĪć P. ŗįēŗĪäŗį≤ŗį®ŗĪć
2ŗįĶ 2ŗįĶ (ŗįēŗįĺŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįģŗĪć) ŗįÖŗįłŗįŅŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪÜŗįāŗįüŗĪć ŗį°ŗĪąŗįįŗĪÜŗįēŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪć: ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗįĺŗįöŗĪÄ ŗį¶ŗĪāŗį¨ŗĪá
3ŗįĶ ŗįÖŗįłŗįŅŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪÜŗįāŗįüŗĪć ŗį°ŗĪąŗįįŗĪÜŗįēŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪć: ŗįĮŗį∑ŗĪć ŗįįŗįėŗĪĀŗįĶŗįāŗį∂ŗĪÄ
ŗįłŗĪĆŗįāŗį°ŗĪć ŗį°ŗįŅŗįúŗĪąŗį®ŗįįŗĪć: ŗįúŗĪÄŗį§ŗĪā ŗįöŗĪĆŗį¶ŗįįŗįŅ
ŗįłŗĪĆŗįāŗį°ŗĪć ŗįįŗįŅŗįēŗįĺŗįįŗĪćŗį°ŗįŅŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪć: ŗįįŗįĺŗįĻŗĪĀŗį≤ŗĪć ŗįĮŗįĺŗį¶ŗįĶŗĪć
ŗįįŗĪÄ-ŗįįŗįŅŗįēŗįĺŗįįŗĪćŗį°ŗįŅŗįāŗįóŗĪć ŗįģŗįŅŗįēŗĪćŗįłŗįįŗĪć: ŗį¶ŗĪáŗį¨ŗįúŗįŅŗį§ŗĪć ŗįöŗįĺŗįāŗįóŗĪć‚ÄĆŗįģŗĪą (ŗįęŗĪćŗįĮŗĪāŗįöŗįįŗĪć‚ÄĆŗįĶŗįįŗĪćŗįēŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįģŗĪÄŗį°ŗįŅŗįĮŗįĺ LTD)

snippet.title: Ghis Ghis Ghis | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Akshara Singh | Vikram Montrose | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting the ultimate collaboration of the year, Bollywood Khiladi Akshay Kumar teams up with the undisputed queen of Bhojpuri cinema, Akshara Singh. ūüĒ•ūüé∂ Ghis Ghis Ghis from 'Welcome to the Jungle' sung by Vikram Montrose and Supriya Pathak, with catchy lyrics by Abhinav Shekhar, is not just a song; it‚Äôs a high-octane Bollywood-Bhojpuri celebration packed with desi swag, electrifying energy, and nonstop entertainment.

Ghis ghis ghis ghis ghis 
Ghis ghis ghis
Ghis ghis ghis ghis ghis 
Ghis ghis ghis
Ae Raja sabun se
Ae Raja
Ae Raja

Bahiya mein bharke peesela chakki
Honthva pe kaate jaise madhumakkhi
Tani paas aava naughty girl
Bahiya mein bharke peeseni chakki
Honthva pe kaatab jaise madhumakkhi

Meetha khilayi ke
Aadat lagayi ke
Bhag na jahiyan raja ji

Hamar laagal ba dilva
Arre laga ba kaare gori

Hamar laagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela deb sabun se
Tohar lagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela de tu sabun se

Arre poora chamka debe kaare

Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Mathva pe hathva se ghis ke sabuniya
Ragde jawaani pura bhar bhar ke

Ghis ghis ghis ghis ghis 
Ghis ghis ghis arre ghisa rani

Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Re pithiya dabaye rani chadh chadh ke
Kohni gadaye jab bada maza aaye
Chalke jawani pura bhar bhar ke

Meetha khilayi ke
Aadat lagayi ke
Bhag na jahiyan raja ji

Hamar laagal ba dilva
Arre laga ba kaare gori

Hamar laagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela deb sabun se
Tohar lagal ba dilva playboy se
Ragad ke nehela de tu sabun se
Arre poora chamka debe kaa re

snippet.title: DRAGON Hindi Trailer | Jr NTR | Prashanth Neel | Anil Kapoor | Ravi Basrur | NTRNeel
snippet.description:
DRAGON Official Trailer (Hindi) : Man of Masses Jr NTR is BACK! | Prashanth Neel | Anil Kapoor | NTR 31

The Man of Masses Jr NTR unleashes absolute fury in the highly anticipated Hindi trailer of DRAGON! Directed by the mastermind behind KGF and Salaar, Prashanth Neel, prepare to enter a gritty, high-stakes world of the Golden Triangle.

Set against the dark backdrop of 1967, witness the ultimate clash as Luger (Jr NTR) faces off against the Chief of India's Narcotics Bureau, Raghuveer Rathod (Anil Kapoor). A cinematic storm is brewing. Are you ready for the ultimate destruction protocol?

Hitting cinemas worldwide on June 11, 2027.

Starring: Jr NTR, Anil Kapoor, Rukmini Vasanth, Biju Menon  
YouTube
Written & Directed by: Prashanth Neel  
YouTube
Music by: Ravi Basrur  
YouTube
Director of Photography (DOP): Bhuvan Gowda
Produced by: Mythri Movie Makers & NTR Arts

#Dragon #DragonHindiTrailer #JrNTR #PrashanthNeel #NTRNeel #Anil Kapoor #RaviBasrur #panindia

Reels - https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/2464772660612736?igsh=MW5tOGcydXBid3RndA==

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ūüéß  Audio Credits

‚ěü Featuring: Shahid Kapoor and Rashmika Mandanna 
‚ěü Music Label : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
‚ěü Singer : Arijit Singh and Sunidhi Chauhan
‚ěü Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
‚ěü Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

‚ěüMusic Programmer and Arranger - Arijit Singh, Sunny M.R., Meghdeep Bose, AM.AN
‚ěüSound Design - Arijit Singh, Sunny M.R., Ashwin Kulkarni, DJ Phukan, Ritvik Shah 
‚ěüMixed and Mastered by - Shadab Rayeen at NewEdge
‚ěüChief Engineer - Ashwin Kulkarni
‚ěüMusic Production Managers - Anurag Sharma, Brianna Supriyo
‚ěüStudio Manager - Mithila Lad Nayak
‚ěüSound Engineers - Pranav Gupta, Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee
‚ěüVocal Conductors - Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee, Aniruddh Anantha
‚ěüStudio Assistants - Khush Jaggi, Ameya Dayal, Sagnik Mukherjee
‚ěüStudio Intern - Anushree Amod
‚ěüBacking Vocal Design - Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan
‚ěüBacking Vocals - Thomson Andrews, Arun Kamath
‚ěüChorus - Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee, Ameya Dayal
‚ěüMixing Assistants to Shadab - Jazbaat, Sohamm, Suryansh
‚ěüRecording Engineers at Arijit Singh‚Äôs Studio - Ritvik Shah, Sukanto Singha

Musicians :-
‚ěüLive Acoustic Guitar : Arijit Singh, John Paul, Saswata Das
‚ěüLive Electric Guitar & Bass : John Paul

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2‚Äč, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

ūüé¨ Video Credits

‚ěü Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
‚ěü Directed By: Homi Adajania 
‚ěü Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg
‚ěü Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
‚ěü Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

‚ěü Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
‚ěü Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
‚ěü Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
‚ěü Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
‚ěü Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Jeene ki hai tu hi vajah
Jeena tere liye
Main kya kahun ke yaar tu
Hai Kya Mere Liye

Zamane me kahin
Meri tarah kabhi
Chahega na koi
Tujhko

Jaise maine diya
Vaise poori tarah
Dil dega na koi
Tujhko

Tujhko..
Jab Se Mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana Jahan..
Tujhko..

Subah ki saari furtiyan
Bekhudi har shaam ki
Na ho tere saath mein
Toh meri kis kaam ki

Uthe jo mera har qadam
Tere sang shuruat me
Haath daale Haath me
Fiqr kya anjaam ki

Mujh mein zyaada ab tu hi hai
Jitna main hoon voh kyun hi hai
Kuch aisa kar main dhoondhoon bhi toh
Paun na khudh ko..

Tu hi toh aasman
Tu hi meri zameen 
Maana hai Zindagi
Tujhko..

Bin maange har dua
Poori hui meri
Paaya jo humnasheen
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Jab se mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana jahan..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..

Galatiyan bhi teri
Main gawara karun
Ye khata hi sahi, par dobara karun

Kya karun sarphira
Ishq hi hai mera
Izhaar ka yahi tareeqa hai mera..

Aankhon ki hai tu raushni
Tu hi toh khaab hai
Main hoon agar savaal toh
Tu hi jawaab hai..


¬© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

Jeene ki hai tu hi vajah
Jeena tere liye
Main kya kahun ke yaar tu
Hai Kya Mere Liye

Zamane me kahin
Meri tarah kabhi
Chahega na koi
Tujhko

Jaise maine diya
Vaise poori tarah
Dil dega na koi
Tujhko

Tujhko..
Jab Se Mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana Jahan..
Tujhko..

Subah ki saari furtiyan
Bekhudi har shaam ki
Na ho tere saath mein
Toh meri kis kaam ki

Uthe jo mera har qadam
Tere sang shuruat me
Haath daale Haath me
Fiqr kya anjaam ki

Mujh mein zyaada ab tu hi hai
Jitna main hoon voh kyun hi hai
Kuch aisa kar main dhoondhoon bhi toh
Paun na khudh ko..

Tu hi toh aasman
Tu hi meri zameen 
Maana hai Zindagi
Tujhko..

Bin maange har dua
Poori hui meri
Paaya jo humnasheen
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Jab se mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana jahan..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..

Galatiyan bhi teri
Main gawara karun
Ye khata hi sahi, par dobara karun

Kya karun sarphira
Ishq hi hai mera
Izhaar ka yahi tareeqa hai mera..

Aankhon ki hai tu raushni
Tu hi toh khaab hai
Main hoon agar savaal toh
Tu hi jawaab hai..

snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Cast: Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee, Preity Zinta

hi.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man (From "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke") Salman Khan, Rani, Preity |Sonu Nigam & Alka Y
hi.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Credits:

Singer(s): Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer
Cast: Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee, Preity Zinta
Director: Abbas-Mustan

snippet.title: Extreme Bus Driving Gameplay in Bus Simulator Indonesia | Dangerous Offroad Bus Trip
snippet.description:

Raatein hui roshan ab meri ,,
Andhero bhari shab na rahi ,,
Tu meri hai mai tera hu,,
Tu Shaam meri savera tu ,,
aawara dil ka basera tu ,,
Hm Dil me lgaa le dera tu ,,

Gujaara naa yaara na ab tere bina ,,
Na raatein savera na tere bina,,
Gujaara naa yaara na ab tere bina ,,
Na raatein savera na tere bina,,

Jarurat naa laagay hai ab koi jabse hai tu milgea ,, dil ko hai tu milgea  ,,
Murjhaaye they khaabo k aasmaa tu aaya har khaab khilgea ,, hm mera har khaab khilgea ,,

Tu chand mera mai sitara tu ,,
Ishq saare ka sara tu ,,
Mai dariya hu kinara tu ,,
Hm dil may lgaa le dera tu  ,,

Gujaara naa yaara na ab tere bina ,,
Na raatein savera na tere bina,,
Gujaara naa yaara na ab tere bina ,,
Na raatein savera na tere bina,,

snippet.title: Sabdakar - PARMARTH (Ultimate Truth) Prod by @irrekobeats
snippet.description:
Check out the official lyrical video for "PARAMATH" by Sabdakar, a promising poet  in the Nepali rap scene. 
PARMARTH means Ultimate TRUTH it is mor than just a song, It's about standing up against inner feelings, and personal experiences, The gritty realism of the lyrics combined with the hypnotic and deep word with rhythm of the sad beat creates a unique sound that is undeniably Sabdakar

Written & Performed by: Sabdakar
mixing mastering by: IRAZ
Visuals by: ITISH
prod by: IRREKO BEATS

ne.title: Sabdakar - PARMARTH (Ultimate Truth) Prod by @irrekobeats
ne.description:
Check out the official lyrical video for "PARAMATH" by Sabdakar, a promising poet  in the Nepali rap scene. 
PARMARTH means Ultimate TRUTH it is mor than just a song, It's about standing up against inner feelings, and personal experiences, The gritty realism of the lyrics combined with the hypnotic and deep word with rhythm of the sad beat creates a unique sound that is undeniably Sabdakar

Written & Performed by: Sabdakar
mixing mastering by: IRAZ
Visuals by: ITISH
prod by: IRREKO BEATS

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Herai Basai | Extended Version | OFFICIAL VISUALIZER
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies, since so many of you said Herai Basai felt too short, we wanted to give it a little more life by making an extended version. We asked you all to send in videos with the people, places, pets, or anything you love, and we were truly overwhelmed by the incredible flood of love and support that came in. Watching all your beautiful videos made us smile so much, and it meant the world to see how deeply this song connected with you. We‚Äôre so sorry we couldn‚Äôt fit every single submission, but please know we‚Äôre endlessly grateful to everyone who took the time to share something so special with us. We hope this video makes you smile and fills you with warmth, because I was smiling ear to ear when I watched it for the first time too ;)

ūüéĶ Lyrics:

Let's get the party started
See you at the bar, you was hardly talkin'
That's when I knew that your heart was scarrin'
Friends to lovers, need a part to star in, like, "Wait, babe"
Let me ask your pardon
This ain't Gucci, this is Prada, darlin'
If you want somethin', you can ask me, darlin'
Then you started laughin' 'cause you think I'm jokin'
But lookin' in your eyes is the best thing
Brake lights givin' you the red skin
You was in a bad mood from we stepped in
Though you checked out 'fore we even checked in
On the phone you gon' vent to your best friend
The one who gave me the lecture, but I ain't gon' sweat you, babe
I'ma let you catch up with your boy, undress you
And let me tell you why I'ma bless you

[Chorus: Tems]
It's the way my mind fallin' away
In my heart, I know
You feel the same when you're with me
You know I'm all you need
You're where I wanna be
My darling, can't you see?

[Post-Chorus: Tems]
I love you, I love you
I love you, I love you
I love you

[Verse 2: Tems & Dave]
Fell into you
Say you want me in the mood
Tryna hide my feelings for you
Don't wanna argue, not with you
Tell me why you're so in denial
Hold me close, don't tell me goodnight
Are you down to get me?
Tell me when you're ready, I'm ready (Yeah)

[Verse 3: Dave & Tems]
We can get into it or we can get intimate
The shower when you sing in it
Better than Beyonc√©, I like the sound of fianc√©e
You know, it's got a little ring to it
And really when I think of it
Growin' up, I didn't ever see marriages
No weddings, no horse, no carriages
I wanna do things different and change the narrative
God knows you a wild child, beautiful child, I need your help
Lookin' like you come from the '90s by yourself
My mum sixty-one and her favourite line to tell her son is
Sometimes she wish that she had a girl (Girl)
I wanna take you back to a time, back to a trip
You had that white wine that I never got to sip
And dinner wasn't ruined 'cause you never got to pick
I know that everybody told me that I'm sick 'cause

[Chorus: Tems]
It's the way my mind fallin' away
In my heart, I know
You feel the same when you're with me
You know I'm all you need
You're where I wanna be
My darling, can't you see?

[Post-Chorus: Tems, Tems & Dave]
(I love you) Me and you, never let me go
(I love you) Me and you, I'll tell you two times
Me and you, never let me go
(I love you) Me and you, I'll tell you two times
It's me and you, never let me go
(I love you) Me and you, I'll tell you two times
Me and you, never let me go
Me and you, I'll tell you two times

[Bridge: Dave & Tems]
I said lean with it, rock with it (You're the only one I want)
Your finger, I can put a rock in it (You're the only one, my baby)
Finger, I can put a rock in it (You're the only one I want)
Banker, they can put a block in it (You're the only one, my baby)
Said rock with it, bounce with it (You're the only one I want)
Your left wrist, I can put my house in it (You're the only one, my baby)
You wanna bet, babe? I can put my house in it (You're the only one I want)
Babe, I could put my spouse in it (You're the only one, my baby)

[Outro: Dave]
I said shimmy-shimmy, yay, shimmy, shimmy-shimmy, yah
5'9", brown eyes, and she in it, in it
Shimmy-shimmy, yay, shimmy, shimmy-shimmy, yah
5'9", brown eyes, innit, innit
Shimmy-shimmy, yay, shimmy, shimmy-shimmy, yah
5'9", brown eyes, and she in-in‚ÄĒ
Shimmy-shimmy, yay, shimmy, shimmy-shimmy, yah
5'9", brown eyes

Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana | Hanuman Bhajan for Energy, Bhakti & Positivity | Sanatan Music

‚ÄúShri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana‚ÄĚ is a joyful and powerful Hanuman bhajan filled with Ram bhakti, celebration, and devotional energy. This song beautifully shows the deep love of Hanuman ji for Shri Ram ‚ÄĒ where the name of Ram is sung, Hanuman is always present with devotion, strength, and divine joy.

This Hanuman bhajan is perfect for morning devotion, Tuesday/Saturday puja, Ram bhakti gatherings, satsang, festive playlists, workout motivation, or anytime you want to fill your space with high-energy bhakti.

‚ú® Why listen to this Hanuman bhajan:
‚ÄĘ Brings energetic Ram bhakti and powerful devotional vibes
‚ÄĘ Perfect for Tuesday/Saturday puja, satsang, and daily devotion
‚ÄĘ Helps build courage, positivity, and inner strength
‚ÄĘ Creates an uplifting atmosphere filled with Hanuman ji‚Äôs protection and grace

snippet.title: Shararat - 8K Video | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Shashwat S, Jasmine, Madhubanti, Ayesha, Krystle
snippet.description:
Shararat in stunning 8K brings playful vibes and infectious energy in ultra-high definition.

ūüĎČ Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Song Name: Shararat
Music: Shashwat Sachdev
Singers: Madhubanti Bagchi, Jasmine Sandlas
Lyrics: Jasmine Sandlas, Shashwat Sachdev

Lyrics:
Tune parda uthaaya, haaye kya baat ho gayi 
Haaye 
Ye mulakaat, vaardaat ho gayi 
Nain milaaye humne ik dooje se yoon 
Raat hui 
Phir din 
Phir se raat ho gayi 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Ik afeemi main chaskha chakhaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Aye Haye Tum bhi ho tanha 
Aur hum akele Jo saath huye laajawab ho gaye 
Tum bhi haseen aur hum aashqeen 
Jo raat huyi benaqaab ho gaye 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Gulabi ye sharbat pilaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik rangeela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan

#Shararat
#dhurandhar 
#ranveersingh 
#shashwatsachdev 
#madhubantibagchi 
#JasmineSandlas

ASHMA THARU
HEMANT THARU
ASHISH THARU

LYRICS:-

Tohar vhatu chaudgaran ghar k 
Tension na leo khan pan k 
Katil ba adaa tohar jyan na maro jaan jan k
Xoro tuh beggi pant suhaitho gahna sutiya me ho
Nano sali jaar k jhor mai baithal batu khatiya me 
Hah

Larhiya te nai ho sali mela chali tractor se
Heroni banbo sali bolo call milau director he 
Director xoro mayak direction dekhaim tohar didi ja fe kahhi tb fe maya mai lagaim 

Katho maya lagal vhatu lekin hertho kabo nai 
Furhun maya kartho ki tu muhin detho ho sajay 
Sajay deho lekin pyar se thorik
Sali vhatuk rista nata xoro banjao tuh morik

Sali aadhi ghar wali kathai pura mai banalu 
Bato lobh lagtik sughar sochthu maya fe lagalu
Mai te lagaibu ho sali maiya tohar ka bichar bawe
Atna sughar kaise kaucha sundarta k raaj bawe
 
Ghana daili sali barda oo vhaisa le 
Ha sali vhatuk maya keu fe kine na seki paisa le 
E maya lagaina karan te bahute dher bawe lekin 
Maya lagal sali tohar baisa le

Maya te lagal sali kahe janek paral 
Khali risaile se nai hoith milke rahe janek paral 
Janek te paral tharu jati kahna ka ho 
Apan purkhauli sanskar sange laike chalek paral 
Tharu madra k taal 
Maghi naya ho saal 
Morik aankhi ba laal 
Pi k andi k jaar 
Hathem surik sikar 
Sub or tharuk jaykar
Ulta sidha bole se tai pahile kailehas bichar

Dekho Korea Japan me fe tharu k bakhan 
Pure bishwo bhar me famous haman tharu pahichan 
Haman alag khan pan haman chutte bawe shan 
Tabbe kathai tharu cast nai ho hobe e brand


#SALIHOO#Tharu#amrisu
||Tharu song , Tharu rap song , new Tharu song ||

snippet.title: 1000 Players Simulate PRISON in Hardcore Minecraft
snippet.description:
On the Unstable SMP,  over 1000 players have been captured and trapped inside the largest prison on the server. This is the full story of how I escaped Purgatory...

1000 Players Simulate PRISON in Hardcore Minecraft


Unstable SMP Members
‚ěú @wemmbumc 
‚ěú @FlameFragsMC 
‚ěú @ParrotX2 
‚ěú @Spokeishere 





possible spoilers below this point

Features: @jamatopecan @MapiccMc @jumperwho @devMCchamp2 ItsAli @found2fast(twitch) @n3tm3tr1x (https://www.youtube.com/@n3tm3tr1x) & all of the trusted members!

music: 
Hollow Knight: Silksong soundtrack by Christopher Larkin (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q6is6K8jbho&pp=ygUTc2lsa3Nvbmcgc291bmR0cmFjaw%3D%3D)
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Chris Christodoulou /  @AstronautDown  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

spoke

Is video me hum baat karenge Piyush Joshi ke viral live stream clip ki jahan viewers ka claim hai ki stream ke dauran hack panel / suspicious tools dekhe gaye. Kya ye sach hai ya sirf misunderstanding? ūü§Į

Maine is video me live stream ke clips, proof, community reactions, gameplay moments aur pura incident deep analysis ke sath explain kiya hai. Agar aap Free Fire player ho ya gaming controversies follow karte ho to ye video end tak zarur dekho. ūüĒ•

Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚ÄĒ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

ŗįéŗįüŗĪĀŗįĶŗįāŗįüŗįŅ ŗįģŗįĺŗįįŗĪćŗį™ŗĪĀŗį≤ŗĪĀ, ŗįęŗįŅŗį≤ŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪĀ ŗį≤ŗĪáŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįģŗįįŗĪč ŗįóŗĪĀŗįįŗĪĀŗįĶŗįĺŗįįŗįā ŗį™ŗĪćŗįĮŗįĺŗįēŗĪć ŗįďŗį™ŗĪÜŗį®ŗįŅŗįāŗįóŗĪć ŗįĶŗĪÄŗį°ŗįŅŗįĮŗĪčŗįēŗįŅ ŗį§ŗįŅŗįįŗįŅŗįóŗįŅ ŗįłŗĪćŗįĶŗįĺŗįóŗį§ŗįā! ūüôĆ EA ŗį≠ŗįĺŗįįŗĪÄ ŗį®ŗįŅŗįįŗĪćŗįĶŗįĻŗį£ ŗį™ŗį®ŗĪĀŗį≤ ŗįēŗĪčŗįłŗįā ŗįłŗįįŗĪćŗįĶŗįįŗĪćŗį≤ŗį®ŗĪĀ ŗį®ŗįŅŗį≤ŗįŅŗį™ŗįŅŗįĶŗĪáŗįĮŗį°ŗįā ŗįĶŗį≤ŗĪćŗį≤ ŗįąŗįįŗĪčŗįúŗĪĀ ŗįģŗĪáŗįģŗĪĀ ŗįēŗĪäŗįāŗįöŗĪÜŗįā ŗįÜŗį≤ŗįłŗĪćŗįĮŗįā ŗįÖŗįĮŗĪćŗįĮŗįĺŗįģŗĪĀ, ŗįēŗįĺŗį®ŗĪÄ ŗįłŗįįŗĪćŗįĶŗįįŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪĀ ŗįÖŗįßŗįŅŗįēŗįĺŗįįŗįŅŗįēŗįāŗįóŗįĺ ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗį§ŗĪćŗįĮŗįēŗĪćŗį∑ŗįģŗįĮŗĪćŗįĮŗįĺŗįĮŗįŅ ŗįģŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗĪĀ ŗįéŗįāŗį§ŗĪč ŗįÜŗįłŗįēŗĪćŗį§ŗįŅŗįóŗįĺ ŗįéŗį¶ŗĪĀŗįįŗĪĀŗįöŗĪāŗįłŗĪćŗį§ŗĪĀŗį®ŗĪćŗį® ŗįÖŗį≤ŗĪćŗįüŗįŅŗįģŗĪáŗįüŗĪć ŗįüŗĪÄŗįģŗĪć ŗįÜŗįęŗĪć ŗį¶ŗįŅ ŗįłŗĪÄŗįúŗį®ŗĪć (UTOTS) ŗįöŗįŅŗįĶŗįįŗįēŗĪĀ ŗįĶŗįöŗĪćŗįöŗĪáŗįłŗįŅŗįāŗį¶ŗįŅ!

ŗįąŗįłŗįĺŗįįŗįŅ EA ŗį®ŗįŅŗįúŗįāŗįóŗįĺŗį®ŗĪá ŗįēŗĪäŗį®ŗĪćŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįÖŗį¶ŗĪćŗį≠ŗĪĀŗį§ŗįģŗĪąŗį® ŗįēŗįāŗįüŗĪÜŗįāŗįüŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį®ŗĪĀ ŗįúŗĪčŗį°ŗįŅŗįāŗįöŗįŅŗįāŗį¶ŗįŅ. ŗįģŗį®ŗįēŗĪĀ ŗįłŗįįŗįŅŗįēŗĪäŗį§ŗĪćŗį§ ŗį™ŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪá ŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪąŗį≤ŗĪćŗįłŗĪć, ŗįíŗįē ŗįĶŗįįŗį≤ŗĪćŗį°ŗĪć ŗįēŗį™ŗĪć ŗįģŗĪčŗį°ŗĪć ŗįģŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗĪĀ ŗį™ŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪáŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗĪąŗį≤ŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįČŗį®ŗĪćŗį®ŗįĺŗįĮŗįŅ. ŗįēŗįĺŗį®ŗĪÄ ŗįģŗį®ŗįā ŗįáŗįēŗĪćŗįēŗį° ŗį¶ŗĪáŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗĪčŗįłŗįā ŗįČŗį®ŗĪćŗį®ŗįĺŗįģŗĪč ŗįģŗĪÄŗįēŗĪĀ ŗįáŗį™ŗĪćŗį™ŗįüŗįŅŗįēŗĪá ŗį§ŗĪÜŗį≤ŗĪĀŗįłŗĪĀ... ŗįÖŗį≤ŗĪćŗįüŗįŅŗįģŗĪáŗįüŗĪć TOTS ŗį™ŗĪćŗįĮŗįĺŗįēŗĪć ŗįłŗĪćŗį™ŗįĺŗįģŗįŅŗįāŗįóŗĪć ŗįēŗĪčŗįłŗįā! ŗįóŗĪáŗįģŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį≤ŗĪčŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįÖŗį§ŗįŅŗį™ŗĪÜŗį¶ŗĪćŗį¶ ŗįēŗįĺŗįįŗĪćŗį°ŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį≤ŗį®ŗĪĀ ŗįĶŗĪáŗįüŗįĺŗį°ŗįüŗįĺŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗįŅ ŗįģŗĪáŗįģŗĪĀ 500,000ŗįēŗĪĀ ŗį™ŗĪąŗįóŗįĺ ŗįúŗĪÜŗįģŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįģŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗĪĀ ŗįĶŗĪáŗį≤ŗįĺŗį¶ŗįŅ ŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗįĺŗįįŗĪć ŗį∑ŗįĺŗįįŗĪćŗį°ŗĪćŗįłŗĪć‚ÄĆŗį§ŗĪč ŗįłŗįŅŗį¶ŗĪćŗįßŗįāŗįóŗįĺ ŗįČŗį®ŗĪćŗį®ŗįĺŗįģŗĪĀ. ūüíé‚ú®

id.title: Buka Pack UTOTS! Saya Mendapatkan Banyak UTOTS di FC MOBILE!
id.description:
ūüď© Pertanyaan Bisnis ‚Üí rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com

Selamat datang kembali di video pembukaan paket Kamis yang tanpa sensor dan tanpa filter! ūüôĆ Kami sedikit terlambat hari ini karena EA sedang melakukan pemeliharaan besar-besaran, tetapi server sudah resmi aktif dan Ultimate Team of the Season (UTOTS) yang sangat dinantikan akhirnya hadir!

EA benar-benar menambahkan beberapa konten serius kali ini, kami memiliki Gaya Bermain baru, mode Piala Dunia, dan gaya bermain baru. Tapi Anda sudah tahu apa tujuan kami di sini... untuk membuka paket TOTS secara besar-besaran! Kami dipersenjatai dengan lebih dari 500.000 permata dan ribuan pecahan bintang untuk memburu kartu-kartu terbaik dalam game ini. ūüíé‚ú®

Keberuntungan membuka paket dimulai dengan sangat gila di akun pertama dengan mendapatkan pemain walkout di awal, diikuti oleh pemain dengan rating 119 OVR di posisi gelandang. Namun semuanya menjadi kacau balau ketika saya beralih ke akun utama saya dan mendapatkan jackpot besar, superstar generasi berikutnya, Lamine Yamal dengan rating 119 OVR! ūüá™ūüáł‚öĹ

it.title: Apertura Pacchetti UTOTS! Ho trovato un sacco di UTOTS in FC MOBILE!
it.description:
ūüď© Richieste commerciali ‚Üí rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com

Bentornati a un altro video di apertura pacchetti del gioved√¨, senza tagli e senza filtri! ūüôĆ Siamo un po' in ritardo oggi perch√© EA ha dovuto effettuare una manutenzione massiccia, ma i server sono ufficialmente online e l'attesissimo Ultimate Team of the Season (UTOTS) √® finalmente arrivato!

EA ha aggiunto davvero tanti contenuti questa volta: nuovi stili di gioco, una modalit√† Coppa del Mondo e stili di gioco. Ma sapete gi√† per cosa siamo qui... per l'apertura a raffica dei pacchetti TOTS! Siamo armati con oltre 500.000 gemme e migliaia di frammenti stella per dare la caccia alle carte pi√Ļ forti del gioco. ūüíé‚ú®

La fortuna con i pacchetti √® iniziata in modo pazzesco sul primo account con un'apertura iniziale di Walkout, seguita da un enorme 119 OVR nello slot di centrocampo. Ma le cose sono andate completamente fuori controllo quando sono passato al mio account principale e ho fatto centro: ho trovato la superstar di nuova generazione, Lamine Yamal con un OVR di 119! ūüá™ūüáł‚öĹ
